gate: GUARDED FILES (.github/workflows/**) — push only, Jorge merges
description: Replace permanently-red canary-smoke.yml with two honest gates: PR Preview Smoke (Layer 1, pre-merge required) + Production Post-Deploy Verify (Layer 2, post-deploy alerting).
root_cause: Trigger mismatch: canary-smoke ran on push:main, previews only exist for PRs
Wrong health path: curled /health (404) instead of /api/v1/health
Bogus promote-to-prod step: Render auto-deploy already owns prod deploys

required_checks_change.removed: canary-smoke.yml (was never in required-checks list; now deleted)

acceptance: canary-smoke.yml deleted; no required check references it
pr-preview-smoke.yml runs on PR, polls Render API for preview deploy, runs smoke.sh
prod-postdeploy-verify.yml runs on push to main, waits for live prod deploy, alerts on failure
scripts/smoke.sh passes bash -n, is executable, uses /api/v1/health
branch-protection-config.json contexts includes pr-preview-smoke / PR Preview Smoke
required-checks.yml mandatory list includes pr-preview-smoke / PR Preview Smoke
